name: Duran Duran
bio: Duran Duran's catalog remains commercially durable through streaming, 1980s nostalgia, and recurring sync-friendly singles.
notable_for: Video-era pop-rock songs with long-tail replay value.
career_highlight: Their best-known singles still anchor strong long-tail catalog economics.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming and nostalgia playlists keep the songs active.
Strong visual-era recognition helps sustain replay value.
Film and television usage support catalog rediscovery.
